_description: Indian Liver Patient Dataset (ILPD). Lab panel + demographics. All floats unless noted.

_field_notes.alanine_aminotransferase: ALT / SGPT enzyme level in IU/L (integer/float)
_field_notes.aspartate_aminotransferase: AST / SGOT enzyme level in IU/L (integer/float)
_field_notes.total_protiens: Total proteins in g/dL (float, optional — default 0)
